Prototype Neighborhoods For The Hardest Signs

All points are embedded together in one 2D PCA space first. The panels below do not filter points out; they zoom into the regions around the most inaccurate signs. Each zoom is expanded as needed so the true prototype and its nearest confusing prototype are both visible even when they are not locally adjacent.
